name: tsqlanalyzer.vscode
description: Live T-SQL code analysis (design, naming and performance rules) powered by SqlServer.Rules and DacFx.

tsqlAnalyzer.enable.description: Enable live T-SQL analysis of .sql files.

tsqlAnalyzer.serverPath.description: Optional path to a build of the ErikEJ.TSQLAnalyzerCli executable. When empty, the analyzer is run as a NuGet package via the .NET 10 SDK 'dotnet dnx' command (which requires the .NET 10 SDK to be installed).

tsqlAnalyzer.rules.description: Rules expression. All rules are enabled by default; prefix a rule id with '-' to disable it, or with '+!' to promote it to an error, e.g. '-SqlServer.Rules.SRD0004;+!SqlServer.Rules.SRN0005'. Wildcards are supported, e.g. '-SqlServer.Rules.SRN*'.

tsqlAnalyzer.sqlVersion.description: Target SQL Server version used for analysis.

tsqlAnalyzer.additionalAnalyzers.description: Additional analyzer .dll paths to load during analysis.

tsqlAnalyzer.debounceMs.description: Delay in milliseconds after the last edit before analysis is triggered.
